name: ProfileCatalog
summary: The ProfileCatalog class represents a group of controls to select profiles using the profile catalogs.

constructors.name: ProfileCatalog
constructors.summary: Initiates a new instance of the control.

constructors.name: ProfileCatalog
constructors.summary: Initiates a new instance of the control selecting the given profile.

params.name: Profile
params.doc: The profile string that will be selecteed in the dialog.

methods.name: OnValueChanged
methods.summary: Event handler for passing generic catalog data back to dialog

properties.name: ButtonText
properties.summary: Gets and sets the text of the button control.

properties.name: SelectedProfile
properties.summary: The selected profile in the control.

events.name: SelectClicked
events.summary: The SelectClicked event is raised when the Select button is clicked.

events.name: SelectionDone
events.summary: The SelectionDone event is raised when the profile selection dialog is closed.
